# tcg-sandbox_game (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the game.

### Optional

- `game_play_data` (Attributes) The grid configuration and player count settings for the game. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--game_play_data))
- `options` (Attributes) Configuration options for how the game displays cards and other elements. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--options))
- `owner` (String) The user's unique ID who owns this game.

### Read-Only

- `banner_image_public_url` (String) Path to the banner image in the publicly visible managed folder of GCS.
- `banner_vertical_alignment` (Number) Banner vertical alignment.
- `description` (String) The description of the game.
- `name` (String) The name of the game.
- `playable` (Boolean) Indicates whether the game is ready to be played (has sufficient content like cards, sets, etc.).

<a id="nestedatt--game_play_data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `game_play_data`

Read-Only:

- `player_count` (Number) The current player count setting for the game.
- `slots` (Attributes List) Array of grid slots defining the game board layout. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--game_play_data--slots))

<a id="nestedatt--game_play_data--slots"></a>
### Nested Schema for `game_play_data.slots`

Read-Only:

- `column` (Number) The column position of the slot in the grid (0-based index).
- `height` (Number) The height of the slot in grid units (how many rows it spans).
- `max_count` (Number) The maximum number of items this slot can hold.
- `name` (String) Optional display label for this slot/zone (e.g. "Battlefield"). Purely cosmetic.
- `player_owner` (Number) The player number (1-based) who owns this slot, or null if no player owns it.
- `row` (Number) The row position of the slot in the grid (0-based index).
- `type` (String) The types of content a grid slot can hold.
- `visibility` (String) Whether a grid slot is visible to all players (public) or only to its owner (private).
- `width` (Number) The width of the slot in grid units (how many columns it spans).



<a id="nestedatt--options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `options`

Read-Only:

- `card_display_context` (String) Controls where the display mode applies (everywhere or ingameonly).
- `card_display_mode` (String) Controls how cards are displayed in the game (managed or imageonly).
